title: malaxis blephariglottis
intro: Malaxis blephariglottis, also known as the yellow fringed orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Malaxis blephariglottis include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
